text.title: diary-studies Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for diary-studies as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running analysis only after all entries are collected (batch analysis at study end).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Losing context by waiting too long: late-study entries are analyzed without the pattern visibility that incremental coding provides. Themes from early entries often reframe late-entry meaning.

failure-mode.description: Signal-contingent prompts sent at fixed UTC times without per-participant timezone localization.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Prompts arriving at 2 AM local time get skipped or dashed off. LLMs default to UTC and disrespect local norms — pin to verified participant timezone table.

failure-mode.description: Uploading photo entries to a cloud LLM before PII redaction.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Photo entries often contain inadvertent PII: faces, addresses, documents visible in frame. Redact before any cloud upload. EXIF metadata also contains GPS coordinates.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Quote in source language, translate at reporting time only. Auto-translation during analysis changes nuance and destroys the verbatim evidence needed for credibility.
